image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: What if I told you pH isn't just a number?
Context visual: pH tracks hydrogen ion activity in solutions. Acids donate, bases accept these ions.
Escalation visual: But did you know this affects everything from soil to our own bodies?
Evidence visual: A pH below 7 means more hydrogen ions, indicating acidity. Above 7, it’s basic—more hydroxide ions.
Payoff visual: So, next time you check pH, remember it’s more than a scale—it’s a balance of ions.
Cta visual: Curious about more science mysteries? Hit follow for more!
